text.en: AGI is a highly autonomous system that outperforms humans at most economically valuable work.
text.zh: AGI 是高度自主，并能在大多数有经济价值的工作上超过人类的系统。

text.en: AGI should exhibit the full range of cognitive capabilities humans possess.
text.zh: AGI 应当具备人类拥有的全部认知能力。

text.en: Human-level AI needs world models and common sense so it can predict, reason, and plan in unfamiliar situations.
text.zh: 人类水平的 AI 需要世界模型和常识，才能在陌生情境中预测、推理与规划。

text.en: AGI is reached when AI becomes smarter than the smartest individual human.
text.zh: 当 AI 比最聪明的单个人类更聪明时，就达到了 AGI。

text.en: The path to AGI may require more than self-learning in math and code; multimodal learning in the real human world may also be necessary.
text.zh: 通往 AGI，不只是数学和代码里的自我学习；通过多模态参与人类真实世界的学习，也可能是必要条件。

text.en: ASI is an intellect that greatly exceeds human cognitive performance across virtually every domain of interest.
text.zh: ASI 是在几乎所有重要领域都大幅超过人类认知表现的智能。

text.en: Superintelligence is AI dramatically more capable than AGI, exceeding expert skill in most domains and operating at corporation scale.
text.zh: 超级智能比 AGI 强得多：在多数领域超过专家，并能完成一家大型公司的生产活动。

author.en: Sam Altman, Greg Brockman & Ilya Sutskever
author.zh: Sam Altman、Greg Brockman 与 Ilya Sutskever

text.en: A candidate threshold is AI that can outperform any AI-assisted human at leading a major company, country, or research lab.
text.zh: 一个候选门槛是：AI 管理大公司、国家或大型实验室，比任何借助 AI 的人类都做得更好。

text.en: Powerful AI is like a country of Nobel-level geniuses in a datacenter, working autonomously and much faster than humans.
text.zh: 强大 AI 就像“数据中心里的天才之国”：达到诺奖级水平，能自主工作，并远快于人类。

text.en: Superintelligence means AI systems much smarter than humans, beyond reliable human supervision.
text.zh: 超级智能是远比人类聪明、已经超出人类可靠监督能力的 AI 系统。
